<file>
00001| import { getAddress, isAddress } from 'viem'
00002| 
00003| /**
00004|  * Get multiple logo URLs to try in order
00005|  * All URLs are HTTPS to avoid CORS/Mixed Content issues in Farcaster Mini Apps
00006|  */
00007| export function getTokenLogoFallbacks(
00008|   address: string | null | undefined,
00009|   chainId: number,
00010|   symbol?: string
00011| ): string[] {
00012|   // Native token logos - use actual token logos, not chain logos
00013|   if (!address || address === 'native') {
00014|     // For native tokens, use the token logo based on symbol
00015|     // ETH chains (Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism) all use ETH logo
00016|     // Polygon uses MATIC logo
00017|     const nativeTokenLogos: Record<number, string> = {
00018|       // Ethereum - ETH logo
00019|       1: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png',
00020|       // Base - ETH logo (not Base chain logo)
00021|       8453: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png',
00022|       // Arbitrum - ETH logo (not Arbitrum chain logo)
00023|       42161: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png',
00024|       // Polygon - MATIC logo (not Polygon chain logo)
00025|       137: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/matic.png',
00026|       // Optimism - ETH logo (not Optimism chain logo)
00027|       10: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png',
00028|     }
00029|     return [nativeTokenLogos[chainId] || 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png']
00030|   }
00031| 
00032|   const logos: string[] = []
00033|   const lowerSymbol = symbol?.toLowerCase()
00034| 
00035|   // 1. Symbol-based from cryptocurrency-icons (HTTPS, most reliable for major tokens)
00036|   if (lowerSymbol) {
00037|     logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/${lowerSymbol}.png`)
00038|   }
00039| 
00040|   // 2. TrustWallet (HTTPS, good coverage, requires checksummed address)
00041|   // Chain-specific paths as per TrustWallet documentation
00042|   const chainNames: Record<number, string> = {
00043|     1: 'ethereum',
00044|     8453: 'base',
00045|     42161: 'arbitrum',
00046|     137: 'polygon',
00047|     10: 'optimism',
00048|   }
00049|   
00050|   const chainName = chainNames[chainId]
00051|   if (chainName && isAddress(address)) {
00052|     try {
00053|       const checksummed = getAddress(address)
00054|       logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/${chainName}/assets/${checksummed}/logo.png`)
00055|     } catch (e) {
00056|       // If checksum fails, try lowercase
00057|       logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/${chainName}/assets/${address}/logo.png`)
00058|     }
00059|   }
00060| 
00061|   return logos
00062| }
00063| 
00064| /**
00065|  * Get chain logo URL
00066|  */
00067| export function getChainLogo(chainId: number): string {
00068|   const chainLogos: Record<number, string> = {
00069|     1: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/ethereum/info/logo.png',
00070|     8453: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/base/info/logo.png',
00071|     42161: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/arbitrum/info/logo.png',
00072|     137: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/polygon/info/logo.png',
00073|     10: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/optimism/info/logo.png',
00074|   }
00075|   return chainLogos[chainId] || chainLogos[1]
00076| }
00077| 
</file>
